# When to Buy BTC
> Free Bitcoin market signal for long-term holders. Combines the Fear & Greed Index, 200-day moving average, and ATH distance into a single Accumulate / Hold / Caution signal. No trading advice. No noise.

## About
- Tool: https://whentobuybtc.xyz/
- Language: English and German (DACH audience)
- Free to use, no account required, no ads, no affiliate links

## Author
- Imo Babics, Gründer — https://imobabics.com

## Key pages
- [Signal](https://whentobuybtc.xyz/) — Current Bitcoin market signal based on three indicators: Fear & Greed Index, 200-day moving average, and distance from all-time high
- [Wann Bitcoin kaufen](https://whentobuybtc.xyz/wann-bitcoin-kaufen) — Deutschsprachiger Einsteiger-Guide: Was macht der Markt gerade, wie entsteht das Signal, wann lohnt sich der Bitcoin-Kauf, und die steuerliche Haltefrist nach § 23 EStG (privates Veräußerungsgeschäft, Einjahresfrist)
- [What If?](https://whentobuybtc.xyz/#whatif) — Calculator showing the compounding value of small daily habits redirected into Bitcoin over time

## Data sources
- Fear & Greed Index: alternative.me
- Bitcoin price, 200-day average, all-time high: CoinGecko
